text:
DSNP_INTEGRATION_LEVEL, and DSNP_ZERODOLLAR
44835 Plan Base
Plan Crosswalk Edited length of DED_COSTSHARE_TIERS field in Plan Base File to 7 (rather than 6). Added new annual variables to Plan Croswalk file for 2020 and 2021 files: CONTRACT_ID_YY, PLAN_ID_YY and PTCD_INDICATOR_YY
44470 Service Area File Added new variable STATE_ABBRV to the layout
44166 SNP Contract Clarified that SNP_PERCENTAGE_TYPE is not available after 2017
43739 Tier Edit to Plan Base File: 
Updated DED_COSTSHARE_TIERS
